per_criterion_scores.internal_note: Commands were mostly clear but lacked full specificity in some areas, particularly regarding the in-place merge.
There was some improvement, but further iterations could have addressed unresolved issues more thoroughly.
The student demonstrated a reasonable understanding of sorting algorithms but could have provided more detailed guidance on implementation specifics.

justification: The student demonstrated partial understanding with adequate clarity and iterative improvement, but missed opportunities for deeper algorithmic insight.
